title: My MQL5 trading bot - looking for some feedback
author: moonrakerdust
selftext:
I made this MQL5 bot last year and have been tweaking it ever since. Results haven't been too bad so far. 

What do you all think?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: Scalping

replies.author: TheKillerScope
replies.body: Well congrats, would you care to share(here or DM) of the specific setup you have, and what works?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: I'll consider it, it took quite of lot of time and losses to get this system working so lets see how much interest there is.

replies.author: TheKillerScope
replies.body: I only recently started looking into MT5 related stuff, so still a total noob at this so pointers would be appreciated with whatever you feel comfortable sharing.

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: best place to share is the articles section, a lot of people sharing their ideas and bots.

replies.author: TheKillerScope
replies.body: What article section?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: [https://www.mql5.com/en/articles](https://www.mql5.com/en/articles)

replies.author: TheKillerScope
replies.body: Thank you

comments.author: fzulle
comments.body: Tried put the Code in gpt?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: its already highly optimized

comments.author: Big_Sheepherder8950
comments.body: Woww..mind sharing what worked for you in the dms?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: Anytime it has a loss, I coded it in.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Hey there I have my own system for based on machine learning frame.

My system is tested on 6+ years of data and also I have been live trading it for 6 months now.

In short sharpe above 3 and CAGR of 55%.

Would you be interested in seeing the report and live trades data?

replies.author: OJF747
replies.body: Dm me

replies.author: fzulle
replies.body: Dm me

replies.author: VariousInstruction56
replies.body: Dm me

comments.author: Pray-to-RNGesus
comments.body: Looking for feedback or customers? If your bot works, dont ever put it out, unless you are greedy scammer.  Bot will earn sou enough.

replies.author: Short-Photograph4535
replies.body: Curioso di sapere lo stesso punto

replies.author: [deleted]
replies.body: [removed]

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: A little more than that

replies.author: StatisticalSock
replies.body: I know a grid bot when i see one lmao. I have one too that micro scalps. Has a high winrate then when it "hits SL" it goes into grid mode

comments.author: GoodLuckTrader
comments.body: The best feedback will be given by the market

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: not sure its ready for public use yet

comments.author: North_Ad158
comments.body: The drawdown is super high. Are you sure its sustainable over a long period?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: yea, I've been trying to tweak it to minimize. Any suggestions?

comments.author: Academic-Lobster1323
comments.body: For once a real person posts here. Can you tell us what this trades and some high level on the strategy?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: Its a scalping bot, tuned for gold

comments.author: Strong-Ad536
comments.body: U sure this is not trading on grid and multingale ?

comments.author: thecoolkev
comments.body: hi, results look insane 😄 I do not know much about trading bot, but can I ask on which market do you operate? only equities?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: this is gold XAUUSD

comments.author: OJF747
comments.body: Have you run it on 5-10 year data sets to see how it goes? Since gold’s basically had run up (not saying your wrong) genuinely curious longer term back testing ?

replies.author: moonrakerdust
replies.body: I don't have access to long term data.

replies.author: OJF747
replies.body: Try find a dataset on kaggle
